mapper.select: SELECT challenge_log_id AS challengeLogId, user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, log_date AS logDate, status, memo FROM challenge_log WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId} ORDER BY log_date DESC
SELECT challenge_log_id AS challengeLogId, user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, log_date AS logDate, status, memo FROM challenge_log WHERE challenge_log_id = #{logId}

SELECT challenge_log_id AS challengeLogId, user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, log_date AS logDate, status, memo FROM challenge_log WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId} AND log_date = #{logDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_log WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId} AND status = 'SUCCESS'
